name: Retail Estates N.V.
summary: The Belgian public real estate investment trust Retail Estates nv is a niche player specialised in making in out-of-town retail properties located on the periphery of residential areas or along main access roads to urban centres available to users. Real Estates NV acquires these real properties from third parties or builds and commercialises retail buildings for its own account. The buildings have useful areas ranging between 500m√Ç¬≤ and 3,000m√Ç¬≤. A typical retail building has an average area of 1,000 m√Ç¬≤.
